name: ASUS PRIME GeForce RTX™ 5060 8GB GDDR7 OC Edition
highlights: Powered by the NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060 GPU with 3840 CUDA cores for exceptional gaming and creative performance.
Equipped with 8GB GDDR7 memory and 28 Gbps memory speed for smooth gameplay and faster rendering.
Factory overclocked up to 2595MHz in OC Mode for enhanced gaming performance and higher frame rates.
Features PCI Express 5.0, HDMI 2.1b, DisplayPort 2.1b, and support for up to four displays with 8K resolution.
Premium 2.5-slot cooling design with a single 8-pin power connector and recommended 550W power supply.
